channel.title: Pages on Random Inconsequential Thoughts
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Random Inconsequential Thoughts

item.title: About
item.description: Who I Am Hi, I’m Patrick Aikens. I’m a software engineer, and have been for a very long time. I started in the video games industry. Since then I have passed through the insurance industry and the banking industry before ending up at Cox Automotive Inventory Solutions where I remain today. Hobbies I enjoy reading, though I’ve shifted in recent times to more audiobooks as my commute times have increased dramatically.
